infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GuestCam uses the camera so you can take photos and record videos inside an event you've joined.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GuestCam uses the microphone only while you record a video, so your clip has sound.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GuestCam accesses your photos only when you choose to add an existing photo to an event.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GuestCam saves photos and QR codes to your library only when you tap save.

plugins.cameraPermission: GuestCam needs camera access to capture event moments.
plugins.microphonePermission: GuestCam needs microphone access to record event videos.
